verify(bytes,bytes).details: Verifies a consensus proof and returns the updated state, newly finalized intermediate states, and the next authority set ID.

params.previousState: The current trusted consensus state (encoded based on consensus type)
params.proof: The consensus proof to be verified

returns._0: The new consensus state after verification (encoded)
returns._1: Array of newly finalized intermediate states that can be trusted
